# Architecture

Cross-cutting structural facts and mechanisms — read these to understand how the
pieces fit before drilling into a [project](/projects/index.md) or
[subsystem](/subsystems/index.md).

* [Layering](/architecture/layering.md) - runtime vs generator assemblies and the one-way dependency arrow.
* [Bootstrap loop](/architecture/bootstrap.md) - how the runtime quoter is generated by a quoter that quotes itself.
* [Incremental pipeline](/architecture/incremental-pipeline.md) - the `IIncrementalGenerator` shape, tracking names, and the cacheability contract.
